side_effects.description: Peptide degradation from improper pH compatibility in blends (GHK-Cu with other peptides, KPV/GLOW causing denaturation forming jelly)

protocol_notes: Theoretical discussion: GHK-Cu should not be mixed with other peptides due to pH incompatibility. KLOW/GLOW blends invite peptide degradation. BPC-157 requires neutral solution, TB-500 requires slightly alkaline solution. BAC water pH unknown, causing potential denaturation. Notes blends work for some people but degradation not quantified (estimates less than 80% loss).
